page_content:
Additional Information: Both freshman colloquia (CPSD 100 and 101)

are required for students to earn their College Park Scholars citations; however, they can be taken in any order during a student's first year.

CPSD200 College Park Scholars: Science, Discovery & the Universe Second-Year Colloquium (1 Credit)

Advanced colloquium: Continued examination of issues related to science, discovery and the universe.
